# Expected lint findings (only WARNING-level rows for this checker):

# - ex:dog      : SubClassOf :: <blank>       -> WARN
#
# NOT flagged:
# - ex:bites    : Domain :: ex:dog            (populated)
# - ex:bites    : Range :: ex:human           (populated)
# - ex:cat      : rdfs:comment :: <blank>     (annotation, not OMN keyword)
# - ex:cat      : skos:example :: <blank>     (annotation)
